title: What would happen if Shinji or Asuka self destructed
display_title: What would happen if Shinji or Asuka self destructed
wikitext:
[]: What would happen if Shinji or Asuka self-destructed ?             Quote Post by Ccbueno » Sat Apr 07, 2012 1:33 pm Hey guys, I've been thinking about this for a while.... it's silly I know, but i've never seen anyone talking about it. So here it goes.... After the harpies reformed, Asuka self destructs her EVA in desperation instead of being "eaten" by the MPs. What do you guys think it would happen after that? And if Shinji self destructed while being crucified by the MP evas (or at some point before the tanging begins) ? Would Third Impact still take place? (Sorry if I wrote something wrong, it's my first post and I'm brazillian )

[]: Re: What would happen if Shinji or Asuka self-destrucred ?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Apr 07, 2012 1:47 pm In Asuka's case, it would depend exactly what hax powers the harpies have to ignore the blast like they sort of shrugged off being ripped to pieces. Shinji meanwhile was just along for the ride, with essentially no volition of his own.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Apr 07, 2012 2:01 pm In short: Humanity would be F'ed in the A.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sun Apr 08, 2012 6:34 pm If Asuka did it when the MPEs were eating her, and the blast took out their cores, that would put the kibosh on SEELE's plan double quick. They might still be able to do it if the Lance came back, but I'm betting it would go badly for them. I'm not sure Gendo's plan would be affected, though; it's possible he'd just get Rei to tang him and reunite him with Yui and call it a day after that. If Shinji did it . . . well, assuming Yui let it happen, that would fuck everyone. No 3I, the kids are dead, Gendo's fucked, and Rei's left all dressed up with no one to blow. She might run with 3I just to bring Shinji back, or she might just wander off somewhere and go to sleep or something. Who knows?

[]:             Quote Post by Henry Spencer » Mon Apr 09, 2012 7:35 pm I have the feeling that Kyoko would sooner go into Beast Mode than let her pride and joy die. That's what she almost did, but then those pesky lances skewered the both of them. I wouldn't imagine Asuka as being the kind of person to commit a tactical suicide. The same thing would pretty much happen for Shinji. I think the only reason Yui didn't unleash Beast Mode on SEELE's asses is because her son didn't want to (unlike with Zeruel).

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Mon Apr 09, 2012 7:40 pm Henry Spencer wrote: The same thing would pretty much happen for Shinji. I think the only reason Yui didn't unleash Beast Mode on SEELE's asses is because her son didn't want to (unlike with Zeruel).
